nasb.text: By the word of the Lord the heavens were made, And by the breath of His mouth all their host.

esv.text: By the word of the Lord the heavens were made, and by the breath of his mouth all their host.

cnv.text: 諸天藉著耶和華的話而造， 天上的萬象藉著他口中的氣而成。

ccb.text: 诸天靠祂的话而造， 群星靠祂口中的气而成。

csbs.text: 诸天藉着耶和华的话语而造， 其中的万象藉着他口中的气息而成。
